bugs.title: Create List button disabled — cannot create new list
bugs.description: The 'Create New List' button on /account/lists is rendered in a disabled state for authenticated org user. Clicking does nothing. No form appears.
bugs.steps: 1. Sign in as mutykovaelena@gmail.com. 2. Navigate to /account/lists. 3. Observe 'Create New List' button state.
bugs.expected: Button enabled; clicking opens Create List form with Name, Description, Privacy fields
bugs.actual: Button is disabled (aria-disabled=true), no form opens

bugs.title: List Settings fields disabled when opened via detail page 'LIST SETTINGS' button
bugs.description: When navigating to a list detail page and clicking the 'LIST SETTINGS' button, the settings dialog opens but all fields (Name, Description, Privacy) are read-only/disabled. The same dialog opened via the card-level 'Edit' option has fields enabled.
bugs.steps: 1. Navigate to /account/lists. 2. Open a list detail. 3. Click 'LIST SETTINGS' button. 4. Observe field states.
bugs.expected: All fields editable when settings dialog opened from detail page
bugs.actual: Fields disabled via detail page path; only card Edit path enables editing

bugs.title: No dedicated Share button on list card or list detail page
bugs.description: The list card context menu exposes only 'Edit' and 'Delete'. The list detail page has no Share button or Share action. The share URL (containing /shared-list/ path) is only accessible via the List Settings dialog as a read-only input field. There is no direct one-click Share action for copying/sharing a list link.
bugs.steps: 1. Navigate to /account/lists. 2. Open ellipsis menu on list card — only Edit and Delete shown. 3. Navigate to list detail — no Share button in header or actions. 4. Open List Settings (via card Edit) — share URL buried in settings dialog.
bugs.expected: Dedicated Share button on list card or list detail page to copy share link
bugs.actual: No Share button on either surface; share URL only visible buried in List Settings dialog
